content:
Anti Money Laundering Policy

All transactions above USD 10,000 must undergo enhanced due diligence.

Suspicious transactions must be reported within 24 hours.

Customer risk classifications include:

Low Risk
Medium Risk
High Risk

High Risk customers require annual reviews.

Payments Operations

Payment investigations must be resolved within 5 business days.

Failed payments require root cause analysis.

SWIFT Payment Processing

MT103 is used for customer credit transfers.

MT202 is used for bank transfers.

All outgoing messages must pass validation checks before transmission.
